title: QR Code Generator
shortDescription: Create QR codes online from text, links, Wi-Fi credentials and short contact payloads.
metaTitle: QR Code Generator Online | Create QR Codes from Text, Links and Wi‑Fi
metaDescription: Generate QR codes instantly online from text, URLs, Wi‑Fi details and contact data. Preview in real time and download SVG or PNG files.
intro: Create QR codes online in seconds. Paste text, a link, Wi‑Fi details or contact data, then preview and download a clean SVG or PNG version.
overview: This online QR code generator is a fast, client-side tool for turning plain text, URLs, Wi‑Fi credentials and simple contact payloads into scannable QR codes. It updates instantly as you type, shows a live preview and lets you download the result in SVG or PNG format. No sign-up or server upload is needed, making it a practical choice for quick sharing, offline use and print-ready graphics.
howItWorks: Enter the text or data you want to encode.
Watch the QR code preview update instantly.
Download the result as SVG or PNG for sharing or printing.
useCases: Share website links with a scannable QR code.
Create Wi‑Fi QR codes for guests and office visitors.
Generate contact or event QR codes for flyers and business cards.
Prepare print-ready QR graphics for packaging, posters and menus.

examples.title: Website link
examples.output: Scannable QR code for a webpage.
examples.description: Use it on posters, social posts or product inserts.

examples.title: Wi‑Fi access
examples.output: QR code for quick network joining.
examples.description: Useful for homes, cafes and offices.

faq.question: What can I encode in a QR code?
faq.answer: You can encode plain text, URLs, Wi‑Fi credentials, contact details and other short payloads that fit into a QR code.

faq.question: Can I download the QR code as SVG or PNG?
faq.answer: Yes. You can download a vector SVG for editing and printing, or a PNG for easy sharing.

faq.question: Does the generator work in the browser?
faq.answer: Yes. It runs client-side, so your input is processed locally in the browser for fast preview and export.

faq.question: Is the QR code suitable for print?
faq.answer: Yes. SVG is especially good for print because it scales without losing quality.
